[Action]Hands press the mixture into a mass.
[Action]The mass stretches and folds on a board.

[Dough] Dough is flour and water combined into a workable paste.

[user]What happens in electricity?
[Ninereeds]Charges sit still inside a wire.
[Action]A force pushes charges along the metal.
[Action]Charges flow through the circuit path.
[Result]A bulb glows at the end.
[Electricity] Electricity is moving charges that carry energy through a conductor.

[user]How does felt form?
[Ninereeds]Wool fibers lie loose on a table.
[Action]Hot water soaks the fiber pile.
[Action]Hands rub the fibers together.
[Result]A dense mat holds together.
[Felt] Felt is wool fibers matted into a solid cloth.
